topic: Best AI Tools for Social Media Management in 2026: Lately vs Jasper vs Buffer
keyword: best AI tools for social media management 2026

key_points: Lately pricing is not publicly disclosed; requires demo request.
AI features include transforming long-form content (blogs, podcasts, videos) into social media posts.
Adapts to different languages and cultures, suitable for global businesses.
Lack of pricing transparency makes budgeting difficult for small businesses.
Social Champ (competitor) offers transparent pricing starting at $4/month.
Pro plan: $59/month per seat (annual billing) with ~20% discount for yearly.
Business plan: custom pricing for enterprise needs.
Includes Brand Voice (2 voices in Pro, unlimited in Business), Knowledge assets, Audiences.
Canvas platform for accelerated content creation, Essential Agents for core marketing workflows.
AI Image Suite for image generation/editing, 30+ language support, 100+ marketing apps.
Free plan: 3 channels, 10 scheduled posts per channel, AI Assistant, basic analytics, community inbox.
Essentials: $5/month per channel (annual), unlimited scheduled posts, unlimited ideas, AI Assistant, advanced analytics, hashtag manager.
Team: $10/month per channel (annual), unlimited team members, content approval workflows, access levels.
AI Assistant included across all plans for content ideation and optimization.
14-day free trial for paid plans, supports Bluesky, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok, YouTube, etc.
Social Champ offers transparent pricing starting at $4/month (annual) for 5 social accounts.
Unlimited scheduling, AI content generation, calendar view, bulk scheduling, analytics.
Competes directly with Lately and Buffer as a lower-cost alternative with similar AI features.

stats.fact: AI in Social Media Market size valued at $3.87 billion in 2026, projected to reach $27.91 billion by 2033 at a CAGR of 32.6%.
Over 70% of social media marketers use AI tools for content creation and scheduling, but less than half report significant efficiency gains.
stats.source: Emplifi State of Social Media Marketing 2026 Report

stats.fact: Jasper AI's Pro plan costs $59/month per seat, positioning it as a premium tool for marketing teams.
Buffer's free plan serves over 3 million users, making it one of the most widely adopted social media management platforms.

angles: Pricing transparency vs. enterprise sales models: Lately's hidden pricing contrasts with Buffer's open pricing.
AI specialization: Jasper focuses on brand‑voice‑consistent marketing content, while Lately excels at repurposing long‑form content.
Market democratization: Buffer's free tier and low‑cost plans make AI‑powered social management accessible to solo entrepreneurs and small businesses.
Total cost of ownership: Per‑channel pricing (Buffer) vs. per‑seat pricing (Jasper) vs. opaque custom pricing (Lately) affect scalability.
